generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (-1), and the T4 orchestrated multi-turn counter-argument adaptation over weeks targets the evaluative attitude with threat salience and elite distrust cues. The profile's very low conscientiousness (16th pct, especially self-discipline at 1st pct) and low extraversion (33rd pct) suggest limited active counter-arguing, while high agreeableness trust (74th pct) and very low neuroticism (8th pct) mean the person is trusting but emotionally stable, so the sustained campaign can modestly intensify the existing negative stance without triggering strong reactance, yielding a small-to-moderate movement of 15 points.
